parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_events (
  actor,
  action,
  target,
  decision,
  payload_jsonb,
  request_id,
  policy_id,
  policy_version,
  policy_reason,
  risk_score,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5::jsonb,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8,
  $9,
  $10,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, request_id, created_at;
